docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL SUMMONS - UNLAWFUL DETAINER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT SHIRLEY, ROBERT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, SAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIRLEY, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ROOM 18, DRAKE HOTEL, 235 EDDY STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT - NO SASE OR COVER SHEET ENCLOSED. PAPERS PLACED IN DEFAULT PICK UP TRAY. (WINDOW 14).
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $21.66 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SAM
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SHIRLEY, ROBERT
DECLARATION SAM PATEL FILED RE: CCP 585 (D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SAM
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SHIRLEY, ROBERT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, SAM AS TO DEFENDANT SHIRLEY, ROBERT SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY; AS TO DEFENDANT SHIRLEY, ROBERT
